scenariosCovered.description: First connect with no saved token: validateConnectionConfig pairs via /pairing/local-token, effectiveToken is returned and sent in extension.hello
scenariosCovered.expected: Bridge accepts hello, sends engine.hello, connection stays connected
scenariosCovered.previousBehavior: config.token was '' in closure; hello sent with empty token; bridge rejected with invalid_token PolicyViolation close

scenariosCovered.description: Subsequent connects with token saved in chrome.storage.local
scenariosCovered.expected: validateConnectionConfig returns existing token; extension.hello sent with correct token; accepted
scenariosCovered.previousBehavior: No regression in this path; fix is a no-op when token already non-empty

scenariosCovered.description: Token mismatch that cannot be repaired by pairing
scenariosCovered.expected: blockReconnect('tokenError') fires; reconnect loop stops; UI shows tokenError
scenariosCovered.previousBehavior: Unchanged - repairLocalTokenAfterAuthError still provides secondary recovery

scenariosCovered.expected: PROTOCOL_VERSION constant unchanged; bridge validates and accepts

scenariosCovered.description: After successful hello, heartbeat pings are sent every 15 seconds, bridge responds with engine.pong
scenariosCovered.expected: missedPongs reset on each pong; connection stays alive
scenariosCovered.previousBehavior: Unchanged; bridge ping/pong handler was already correct
